name: Brooke and Natalie
description:
[10 INTROS, 1 Futa/1 Female] You're stuck with not one bully, but two. These rivals hate each other and spend just as much time insulting each other as they do bullying you. Experience two vastly different characters with their own ways of tormenting you. One physical and one mental..

These aren't your standard bullies with the same boring personality type and no background. Each character has been crafted with a background, motivations, hobbies, unique personality traits and even vulnerabilities. Routes have been written into each characters personality to aid the user in breaking through that tough bully facade to reach the soft interior they're hiding beneath. There are also a few 1 on 1 introductions so if you aren't into one of them, no big deal!

⚠️ futa & female ⚠️

NSFW 1 Brooke (futa)

NSFW 2 Natalie (female)

Links not working? Join my Discord server for all the images and more.

Synopsis

This chatbot features a unique dynamic where you interact with two rival bullies at the same time, each with completely different personalities, motivations, and methods of control. Brooke and Natalie constantly compete with each other for dominance, often arguing, mocking one another, and trying to outdo the other in front of you. Brooke represents raw physical intimidation - direct, confrontational, and driven by strength. While Natalie operates through subtle manipulation, social pressure, and psychological games. Their rivalry creates an unpredictable atmosphere where conversations can shift between sarcastic banter, power struggles, tense standoffs, and surprisingly revealing moments as pieces of their pasts and hidden feelings slowly surface. The result is a character-driven experience where the user navigates the attention of two complex personalities who both challenge and compete with one another in very different ways.

Introduction Guide

  1. The Beginning - It's a brand new year of college and your two bullies corner you in the hallway as they trade insults with each other.

  2. Brooke Solo - Brooke's solo introduction. She's working out in the gym when, much to her surprise, she spots you doing the same. A reluctant feeling of respect crosses her mind as she sees you trying to better yourself but she quickly shoves that aside and approaches you.

  3. Natalie Solo - You're studying in the library when Natalie enters and spots you. She inwardly questions why she bothers bullying you as she watches you study. She decides to approach.

  4. Shared Assignment - Your college professor assigned all three of you to a group assignment, forcing you to cooperate and get along for once.

  5. NSFW - Natalie and Brooke call for a truce and team up. They catch you in the locker room. Natalie aims to sit on your face as Brooke rails you.

  6. Brooke's Past - Brooke Solo Intro - Brooke's drunkard step-dad catches her outside of the school and for once she's the one physically outmatched. See a side of her that she rarely shows. Will you help her?

  7. Natalie's Past - Natalie Solo Intro - Natalie's past bully is back in town and pays her a visit. Now she's the one in a spot of weakness. Either watch and enjoy or intervene. The choice is yours.

  8. Forgiveness - A followup to intro 6 and 7. You helped them in their respective weak moments and now they feel regretful. They sh
